title: GROUP_ADD caller membership check is non-atomic with add_group_member_capped
description: ws.rs GROUP_ADD: is_group_member(caller) check is a separate DB query before add_group_member_capped. Between the two, the caller can be GROUP_LEAVE'd (or GROUP_REMOVE'd, if implemented). The caller then adds a member to a group they no longer belong to. The new member receives a group notification with a group_id the caller no longer owns. Consequence: non-member can add to group by racing a concurrent leave. Priority 1 not 0: requires tight timing and the consequence is bounded by the group still existing.
